def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    # Sort by code and date for per-code rolling operations
    df = df.sort(['code', 'date'])

    # 1-period delta of close price
    delta_close = delta(pl.col('close'), periods=1)

    # 5-day rolling min and max of delta
    ts_min_delta = ts_min(delta_close, window=5)
    ts_max_delta = ts_max(delta_close, window=5)

    # Condition 1: ts_min(delta, 5) > 0  (all recent deltas positive)
    cond1 = ts_min_delta > 0
    # Condition 2: ts_max(delta, 5) < 0  (all recent deltas negative)
    cond2 = ts_max_delta < 0

    # Nested ternary:
    # if cond1: delta
    # elif cond2: delta
    # else: -delta
    inner = (
        pl.when(cond1)
        .then(delta_close)
        .otherwise(
            pl.when(cond2)
            .then(delta_close)
            .otherwise(-delta_close)
        )
    )

    return df.select(inner).to_series()
